subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Our presence in this Prison, and its breast was adorned with the word wherewith We had answered [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک تلقاء الوجه فی السجن و کان مزینا صدره بالکلمه التی اجبناها فی
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of prayer, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
